hotel_name: Homestay Mai Trường Cù Lao Chàm (Homestay Mai Truong Cu Lao Cham)

reviews.title: An Absolute Gem on Cham Island!
reviews.text:
We had an incredible stay and couldn't have asked for a better experience. If you are looking for a place on the island, this is hands down the best value for money you will find.
The Accommodation:
The apartment is in very good condition and was sparkling clean when we arrived. It’s simple but comfortable, providing everything you need for a relaxing island getaway.
The Host:
The highlight of our trip was definitely the hostess. She is incredibly welcoming, polite, and attentive. She truly goes above and beyond to make sure her guests are happy.
Above and Beyond Service:
We experienced a bit of a crisis when our planned transport failed to pick us up from the island. We were worried about being stranded, but the hostess stepped in immediately. Thanks to her quick thinking and help, she arranged alternative transport and ensured we were successfully delivered back to the mainland.
Summary: Amazing host, clean rooms, and total peace of mind. We highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Cham Island!

reviews.title: We want to back here 🥰
reviews.positives: The owners are super friendly. They meet us near the boat, it was so cute! 🥰 Rooms are clean and comfortable. We drink tea together and communicate.
reviews.negatives: The bed is not soft, if it’s important for you, be attentive.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: A very hospitable hostess who treated us to tea and sweets and told us her story. It was warm and cosy

reviews.title: Ik had een fijne tijd op Cham Islands in deze Homestay.
reviews.positives:
Een fijne plek op een goede locatie.
Een mooie, schone marmeren kamer.
De familie is heel aardig en behulpzaam.
De locatie is dichtbij een heel fijn strand.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Friendly and helpfull hosts. Perfect location on the island.

reviews.title: Location and staff were the highlights!
reviews.positives: Well located right next to the port (2 minutes walk) and less than 10 minutes from a beautiful beach equipped with a beach bar and plenty of deck chairs which are free to use. Perfect for our beachy holiday stay. 10 mins walk from some lovely restaurants as well. Aircon worked well in the rooms and the showers were hot. The owners were so lovely and attentive, gave us snacks to take down to the beach and also helped carry our bags to the port when we were leaving 🥹 they spoke little English but google translate got everything across perfectly! Highlights were the location and staff for sure :)
